title: fatty adventurous Peruvian dasima-kombu Bisque
description: Snappy, fatty and rich peruvian dish featuring dasima-kombu, perfect for adventurous foodies. Brine-dried dasima and kombu are blended with coconut milk, onions and cilantro for a creamy and indulgent soup.
instructions: Combine dasima and kombu in a large pot and cover with water. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes.
Drain the pot and discard the kombu. Add coconut milk, onions, garlic, ginger, cayenne pepper, black pepper and salt. Blend until smooth.
Add cilantro, lemon juice and fish sauce. Season with salt to taste.
Heat the mixture over medium heat, stirring constantly, until warmed through.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
This soup can be made ahead and refrigerated or frozen for later use.
If refrigerated, reheat the soup over low heat, whisking constantly, until warmed through.
If frozen, thaw overnight in the refrigerator and reheat as above.
